orchestratorOverride: 4 assertions (VAL-CLI-004, VAL-CUR-012, VAL-CROSS-005, VAL-CROSS-011) deferred to export milestone because they require export modules that don't exist in core-pipeline. These fulfills claims have been moved to cli-export feature in the export milestone.
